file.body:
Search Buscar
Search items, reagents, or recipes... Buscar objetos, componentes o recetas...
Could not load item details. Please try again later. No se pudieron cargar los detalles del objeto. Inténtalo más tarde.

Items Items

English (US) or English (GB) name is required. English (US) or English (GB) name is required.
Item ID Item ID
Unnamed item Unnamed item
Name Name
Quality Quality
Class Class
Expansion Expansion
State State
Actions Actions
All override states All override states

No override No override

All expansions All expansions
All classes All classes
All subclasses All subclasses

Associate recipe Associate recipe
Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again. Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again.
Class ID and subclass ID are required together. Class ID and subclass ID are required together.
Recipes Recipes
Unable to load recipes. Unable to load recipes.
Unable to load recipe details. Unable to load recipe details.

Override state Override state

recipes recipes

Recipe Recipe
Field Field
Base Base
Override Override
API API
Effective Effective
No comparable fields returned. No comparable fields returned.
Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences. Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences.
Scalar overrides Scalar overrides
Crafted item ID Crafted item ID
Crafted quantity Crafted quantity
Rank Rank
Required skill level Required skill level
Override note Override note
Crafted outputs Crafted outputs
Add output Add output
Item ID Item ID
Quantity Quantity
Skill Skill
Remove Remove
No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited. No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited.
Reagents Reagents
Add reagent Add reagent
Item ID Item ID
Quantity Quantity
Sort order Sort order
No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited. No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited.

Rank Rank
Item ID Item ID
Skill points Skill points
Save override Save override
Cancel Cancel
Edit recipe override Edit recipe override

Profession sync is running…La sincronización de profesiones está en curso… Profession sync failedLa sincronización de profesiones falló Profession sync completedSincronización de profesiones completada You can continue browsing recipes while it finishes.Puedes seguir explorando recetas mientras termina. The profession sync could not be completed.No se pudo completar la sincronización de profesiones. Manage profession talent treesManage profession talent trees Profession talent treesProfession talent trees AdminAdmin Process AuctionHelper SavedVariables locallyProcess AuctionHelper SavedVariables locally Select your SavedVariables folder. The browser finds AuctionHelper.lua and AuctionHelper_Professions.lua, then processes only those matching files on this device.Select your SavedVariables folder. The browser finds AuctionHelper.lua and AuctionHelper_Professions.lua, then processes only those matching files on this device. Replacing talent-tree definitions is destructiveReplacing talent-tree definitions is destructive Local processing and server validation only report available data. They do not import or replace shared talent-tree definitions.Local processing and server validation only report available data. They do not import or replace shared talent-tree definitions. AuctionHelper Lua fileAuctionHelper Lua file Selected: {$INTERPOLATION} ({$INTERPOLATION_1})Selected: {$INTERPOLATION} ({$INTERPOLATION_1}) Process files locallyProcess files locally Processing locally…Processing locally… Choose an AuctionHelper .lua file.Choose an AuctionHelper .lua file. Choose a folder containing AuctionHelper_Professions.lua first.Choose a folder containing AuctionHelper_Professions.lua first. Unable to process these SavedVariables files locally. Check the region and choose a valid AuctionHelper_Professions.lua file, then try again.Unable to process these SavedVariables files locally. Check the region and choose a valid AuctionHelper_Professions.lua file, then try again. One or more item-producing recipes do not include a crafted item ID.One or more item-producing recipes do not include a crafted item ID. One or more quality recipes do not include crafting difficulty or skill data.One or more quality recipes do not include crafting difficulty or skill data. The saved export does not contain a supported profession talent scope.The saved export does not contain a supported profession talent scope. The saved profession talent export could not be decoded safely.The saved profession talent export could not be decoded safely. Some addon data could not be associated safely and was omitted.Some addon data could not be associated safely and was omitted. Unable to submit the normalized profession data. The selected files remain available to retry.No se pudieron enviar los datos de profesión normalizados. Los archivos seleccionados siguen disponibles para volver a intentarlo. The local API could not be reached. Start the backend, then try again.The local API could not be reached. Start the backend, then try again. Local processing resultLocal processing result Submit only the normalized character, profession, recipe, crafted-item, reagent, and crafting-skill fields shown in this summary. No Lua source is included.Submit only the normalized character, profession, recipe, crafted-item, reagent, and crafting-skill fields shown in this summary. No Lua source is included. Submitting…Submitting… Submit normalized dataSubmit normalized data Server validation completeServer validation complete Validated {$INTERPOLATION} character(s), {$INTERPOLATION_1} profession(s), and {$INTERPOLATION_2} recipe(s). No raw Lua was sent.Validated {$INTERPOLATION} character(s), {$INTERPOLATION_1} profession(s), and {$INTERPOLATION_2} recipe(s). No raw Lua was sent.
